title: McCarthy Tétrault Emerging Leaders Recognized by Lexpert Rising Stars
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Emerging Leaders Recognized by Lexpert Rising Stars
Toronto, November 8, 2019 – Solidifying our position as the firm of choice for top legal talent, McCarthy Tétrault is pleased to announce that five of our lawyers have been recognized as emerging leaders within the legal profession by Lexpert Rising Stars: Leading Lawyers Under 40 2019 – the most winners of any firm this year.
“We are proud of our five winners and congratulate them on this outstanding achievement and on their many contributions to the success of our clients and our firm,” said Barbara Boake, Partner and National Practice Leader at McCarthy Tétrault. “We remain committed to investing in the development of our lawyers, ensuring excellence and sustainability in the delivery of services to our clients.”
Exceptional people from across regions were each recognized for their contributions to our clients, our firm, the legal profession and the community. Congratulations to:
- Marie-Eve Bélanger, Litigation Group, Montréal
- Kim Brown, Tax Group, Vancouver
- Gordon Cameron, Business Law Group, Calgary
- Atrisha Lewis, Litigation Group, Toronto
- Morgan Troke, Business Law Group, Vancouver
A list of winners can be found at lexpert.ca .
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, advising on large and complex assignments for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
